table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; table-layout: fixed; font-size: 9px;

td.style: padding: 6px 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; width: 3%; font-size: 9px; vertical-align: top; text-align: center;
padding: 6px 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; width: 12%; font-size: 9px; vertical-align: top; text-align: center;
padding: 6px 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; text-align: center; width: 7%; font-size: 9px; vertical-align: top; white-space: nowrap;
padding: 6px 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; text-align: center; width: 7%; font-size: 9px; vertical-align: top; white-space: nowrap;

table.style: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; margin-bottom: 16px; table-layout: fixed; font-size: 9px;

th.style: padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; width: 25%; text-align: center; font-size: 9px; font-weight: bold;
padding: 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; width: 25%; text-align: center; font-size: 9px; font-weight: bold;

padding: 6px 8px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; width: 25%; font-size: 12px; vertical-align: top; text-align: center;

th.style: padding: 8px 4px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; text-align: center; width: 3%; font-size: 9px; font-weight: bold; vertical-align: middle;
padding: 8px 4px; border: 1px solid #dee2e6; text-align: center; width: 7%; font-size: 9px; font-weight: bold; vertical-align: middle;
